scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace app-sender" "npm run dev --workspace app-farmer"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace app-sender && npm run build --workspace app-farmer
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace app-sender" "npm run start --workspace app-farmer"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace app-sender && npm run lint --workspace app-farmer
